name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Microsoft Excel Template Creation
notes:
This building block detects the creation of template files for Microsoft Excel from a process which is not Excel

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Max Altgelt (Nextron Systems)
SIGMA Title: Office Template Creation
SIGMA Description: Detects creation of template files for Microsoft Office from outside Office


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Microsoft Excel Template Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001830) FileCreate
when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [xlt or xltm or xls or xlsm or xlsx]
when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of \Microsoft\Excel\Startup
when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of EXCEL.exe
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Microsoft Excel Template Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001830) FileCreate
AND when the event matches File Extension (custom) is any of [xlt or xltm or xls or xlsm or xlsx]
AND when the event matches File Directory (custom) contains any of \Microsoft\Excel\Startup
AND NOT when the event matches Process Name (custom) is any of EXCEL.exe
